Watch them as they simulate what it’s like الى work في teams made من a mix من human users و NPCs, dealing مع ال challenges, rewards, و frustrations من being what they are…
CYOA: Skip all ال way below if you just want ال practical تحديثات about NPC Studio و $MONA.- or -Read على لـ what makes this moment في time unique.
ال STATE من SOCIETY, و ال SPECTACLE
It’s two score years since 1984. ال world’s gone full tilt into cyberpunk vibes without ال cool neon aesthetics.
Fear, hope, or cope. What’s your bet لـ where we’re going?

We say that ال principles that brought us here, matter. These values that made ال web, و so much من ال fabric من our technological societies possible, are ال artifacts من us still yearning الى be more free.

We say that freedom, و ال right الى earn a living من ال work we do, ال trades we make, ال culture we create, collect, propagate, و consume, matters. That we have a right الى rise above ال luck و limits من ال circumstances we were born الى, as long as we choose الى practice these skills و invest في ال hard work it takes الى make it so.

Come failure or setback, we get back up again و know we will be better off مع each turn من ال grinding wheel. Up again في ال face من each internal doubt, each snide remark, each threatening cloud من impending fear, saying that we never will.

We say we are ال inheritors من that cypherpunk spirit. Freedom is irrevocable. Power is best when it is fully decentralized. Code is a kind من law, الى arbitrate exchanges و حوكمة من thoughts riding light في ال fibers و circuits between us. و, من course, that all cypherpunks write code.
What we are really saying is that mechanisms, و ال values من ال authors من their design, matter. Like elections, they have consequences.
موس فيتاليك: أي حرية؟
Vitalik wrote some points recently that need mentioning here. You should read ال whole thing .
في short, crypto is more than currencies و blockchains . There are more freedoms too, that we need الى live well و prosper.

That means ال integrity من ال channels we communicate through. Platform independence. ازاي easily we stake claim الى, verify, و use our privacy-friendly بوست-ديجيتال identities. It’s our practical capacity الى think لـ ourselves, و لـ core beliefs الى count لـ something.
ما تفوّتش آخر نقطة دي.

LLM generated persuasion campaigns fight الى capture ال feeds that bait و trigger our cringiest reactions, making independent thinking artificially rare, في a بوست-COVID brain fog kind من way. Poisoned by propaganda و censorship at training level, even companionship و roleplay models can be screened لـ compliance مع party values , privileges revoked arbitrarily, when source, weights, access, و ownership aren’t open و decentralized.
Competitive access الى ال highest quality information, و ال skills الى recognize it, rounds out Vitalik’s short list.

Left unsaid by too many web3 voices is ازاي much deeper it cuts: ال freedoms that crypto exists الى advance, و wouldn’t exist without, are also what clothes you wear, what books you read, what history you learn, what medication you can take, what words you can say, what gender you are, who you can love or marry, what you can or can’t do مع your own body, و who gets الى decide.
Is it you? Or is it ال attention, status, و assets you stack?
الفلوس مهمة، لحد ما تبطل تبقى مهمة. وبالمقارنة، التوافق السياسي غالبًا دايمًا NP-hard.
But if we were here الى just chase bags لـ quick exits, there are much easier ways.
ال LEISURE TRAP: من ROME الى TIKTOK
Hype obscures ال danger. و worse, ال obsession مع passive leisure. ال fetishization من ال appearance من leisure is shilled by influencers 24/7 as a YOLO gambling addiction that never pays off.

This throwback feudal wrapper covers both socialist و capitalist flavors, at least as these twin ideologies are most commonly practiced و understood. Shockingly, it also waves away و even rewards a sudden return من regressive trad-values, all too cozy مع theocratic, monarchist, و ال worst من 19th و 20th century “-ism / -ist” cringe bait rhetoric.

When we obsess over ال promise و worship من passive leisure, pumped و dumped by influencers و frauds, we open ourselves up الى being swept away by this. It’s coded into ال algorithms that run every centralized network feed.

That pick me vibe. ال relentless craving لـ validation و attention at any cost. It’s ال sycophant, desperate الى be noticed, الى be chosen as special في a vast, indifferent dumpster fire من increasingly nasty سوشيال media pranks و theatrics.

Leisure isn’t just relaxation anymore; it’s a status symbol. ال more unattainable و luxurious it appears, ال more desirable it becomes. Influencer culture و media sell leisure activities و lifestyles as Veblen goods, ال more extravagant و exclusive, ال better. These curated lives, appearing carefree و glamorous, promise a taste من something that’s structurally unattainable لـ everyone. They craft an illusion, designed الى generate engagement و consumer spending, not genuine fulfillment or relaxation.

It’s a good that doesn’t deliver على ال high quality part من ال deal. Pay ال high price لـ cheap status, و pay no mind الى ازاي much you lose, or who you sacrifice. This cultural و سوشيال obsession مع ال display من leisure و luxury, disconnected من any reality. Demand goes up as ال price goes up, و ال greater fool believes it will continue الى go up only, forever.

Today’s feudal lords aren’t just over-hyped populist scammers that hijack as much من our attention as they can manage, but even more they are our own addictive impulses و societal pressures. These forces within us exploit our desires لـ status و belonging, trapping us في cycles من unfulfilled cravings و self-devaluation. Just as feudal systems kept people في static roles, our own compulsions و societal expectations keep us striving لـ an appearance من leisure that leads الى self-liquidation, making us easy targets لـ intentionally designed, algorithmically optimized business models. Forget ال Great Depression, it’s ال Great Acceleration into Enshittification, now .
ازاي It Works: ال Illusion من Leisure

We spend money على products و experiences hoping some من that leisure collected by influencers will rub off على us, creating a cycle من consumption that feeds على itself. This is not just any spending, but a kind من consumption that’s like a circular firing squad — purchasing goods that deliver nothing except ال unfulfillable hope من Veblen status.

This leisurely fetish, though, من unlikely web3 + ذكاء اصطناعي influencers, pranksters assaulting strangers لـ views, و authoritarian frauds once wrapped في maxi flags, now letting their masks slip off, is not as simple as that.
True leisure, surplus time, agency, wealth, و power, remain a myth الى be idolized while we’re left holding bags filled مع a perpetual sense من inadequacy.
But, what’s wrong مع passive income و wanting الى have a good time, without worry about ال media intensified doom spiral من ال day, ال hour, ال 15 second TikTok clip? Nothing, at all.

Play و relaxation as a byproduct و reward من ال skills you’ve used, ال efforts you’ve made, ال practically magical insights you’ve gathered, ال work you’ve done… It’s all good. Found a جديد way الى extend ال value or efficiency من some product, process, application, or device? Even better.
ال IMMEDIATE DANGER: PROJECT 2025
If you’re not caught up yet, this is a good time لـ google break: look up Project 2025.

One piece من advice before we continue: Believe people who say you’re no different than ال rest من their enemies و swear ال revolution will be bloodless, if you just let them have everything they want.

There is no way الى sugarcoat it — or الى make sense من ال naive (at best) hot takes من a few من ال more recognizable names في web3. It’s like they’ve never met an authoritarian, known anyone who’s survived و escaped a society controlled by them, or realized that networked *deterrence against* NOT *cheerleading لـ* centralized, top-down, و capriciously violent control, is one من ال main pillars من what decentralized mechanisms are built لـ.
As if Trump supporters are ال persecuted minority. Is it a translation error? Sarcasm that didn’t land? Or just a clumsy joke?
Again, Vitalik has a good, concise, if understated response لـ those who’ve convinced themselves it’s all okay as long as they claim الى be crypto-friendly:
“What ‘crypto-friendly’ means الى authoritarians: There is a particular style من being ‘crypto-friendly’ that is common الى authoritarian governments, that is worth being wary من.”

و then, sometimes ال doublespeak mask slips off. Semi-famous في crypto لـ long or not, there’s no excuse or justification لـ peddling hateful calls لـ war و deportation, as if it’s all synonymous مع freedom as long as their bags are secured..

Now, imagine waking up الى a world where ال President has absolute power, مع absolute immunity لـ all official acts — including sending a team من US Navy Seals الى liquidate anyone that doesn’t worship them مع enough fervor.

Never mind. You don’t have الى imagine it, because SCOTUS made sure الى make it a scenario just one election result away, where a newly supreme leader can operate above ال law, مع nothing الى keep them في check.

If he wins, على day one, ال Insurrection Act will be used الى deploy ال military against peaceful protests و… ليه not declare martial law while they’re at it? This isn’t justice or an orderly crackdown على crime مع due process; it’s retribution. Turning ال streets into battlegrounds و dissent into a fading memory. A militarized state where democratic freedoms are violently crushed, echoing ال darkest periods من world history.
ازاي do we know he’ll actually do it? Well, he’s said so. و, he tried الى do it before , على Jan 6th, 2021 as a last-ditch effort الى stay في office despite losing ال election.

This is not just an American problem, either. Besides ال rise من populist-authoritarian hard right movements في many advanced nations, it’s ال fact that ال fall من American democracy could never be contained only الى American shores. ال world’s foremost economy (since 1871), by far ال most dominant و largest military, و ال third-largest domestic population… what happens في US technological, سوشيال, و political markets hits every capitol, و every screen connected الى ال internet, instantly, riding at ال speed من light. It spills across borders و oceans like a contagion, one domino after another.

You can be sure ال election في November 2024 will be ال most consequential من any since ال early 1930s. Don’t need الى tell you what happened then. Although ال Arsenal من Democracy did manage الى win, لـ ال most part, في ال end.

Here now are a few من ال worst plans في Project 2025, all documented في public على their website و spoken out loud by their surrogates, على camera, على ال news, online, و في interviews, countless times since ال almost 900 page blueprint was released. As if no one thought الى lean في و whisper, maybe they shouldn’t be saying ال quiet part out loud:
AN ARMY من LOYALISTS:

ال federal workforce will be decimated, مع 50,000 experienced civil servants fired و replaced by a handpicked “army” من loyalists. This move politicizes every corner من government, replacing nonpartisan expertise مع devout believers في ال personality cult. Centralizing power around ال President, و eroding ال integrity من everything that keeps ال world’s most influential society, more often than not, civil, open, و free.
ترحيلات جماعية:

No-knock raids و street sweeps will become ال norm, targeting millions من undocumented immigrants. ال result? Imagine ال scale: 10 الى 20+ million men, women, و children, ripped من their homes, caged indefinitely في detention centers, young children never seeing their parents again, و eventually deported. Again, it’s happened before. Many من ال children who were separated من their parents at ال border during ال previous administration still haven’t been reunited 3.5 years later, because they haven’t been able الى be found.

ال logistics alone are staggering, dwarfing ال closest comparable events في history. Think about ال Trail من Tears, or ال internment camps من WWII. These were horrific, but pale في comparison الى what is being prepped by ال Project 2025 braintrust now. What happens الى ال families they leave behind? ال trauma, ال guilt, و ال shame will haunt America, و harm ال world, لـ generations.
Even if we focus just على crypto bag holders, what happens الى ال US, و world economies by extension, when millions من workers و consumers are removed overnight?
حظر الإجهاض:

If he wins ال election في November, a nationwide ban على abortion will be signed ال moment it hits Trump’s desk في ال Oval Office. You can be sure من it, no matter ازاي much he tries الى deny it الى get a few more votes now. A ban like this, مع no exceptions لـ rape, incest, or ال health من ال mother, و criminalizing ال transport or shipping من Mifepristone (most abortions are medically induced early في a pregnancy), often as an accessory الى “murder”.

ال threat الى health is also already being felt في ال drastic increase من women experiencing a miscarriage who have been turned away من medical care في states that have passed near total abortion bans في ال past 2 years since ال Dobbs decision. They are turned away as fear takes priority over sound medical judgment, by doctors و hospitals protecting themselves من criminal و financial liability.

As if it wasn’t enough, this isn’t just about women’s health و rights الى make medical decisions being taken away. At its core it’s everyone’s bodily autonomy at stake, except لـ ال chosen few who rule above ال law, perversely given power over other people’s bodies as if we were all their property.
But we also know that لـ some twisted reason ال authors من Project 2025, their allies, و flag bearers, have an obsession مع controlling و abusing women في particular.
حظر أطفال الأنابيب:
في-vitro fertilization will be banned, eliminating what is often ال only choice لـ many families ready الى have a child, but لـ countless reasons medically unable الى.
حظر وسائل منع الحمل:

Contraceptives will also be outlawed, increasing ال rate من forced births, again putting women’s health, و causing a chilling effect على personal autonomy و any semblance من freedom. This isn’t just a step backward; it’s a collapse into a too recent past where women’s bodies were contractually owned by older male family members, religious institutions, و ال state.
في many countries, access الى birth control is still owned by male partners. It’s doubtful that will happen في ال US, because ال pill won’t even be available الى them.
حظر الهوية الترانس:

Transgender identity will be criminalized, و punished severely. Leading الى random acts من increased violence و widespread discrimination, forced conversion therapy, و systemic erasure. This isn’t just a public policy debate; it’s an attack على who you are, و who gets الى decide ازاي you express it
DISMANTLING 100+ YEARS من CIVIL RIGHTS PROGRESS:
Key civil rights rulings من ال past century, including protections لـ voting rights, will be undone. Gender equality, LGBTQ+ rights, protections against racial discrimination, all gone.
حظر المحتوى الإباحي:

Outlawing pornography might seem like a moral panic, or a fringe fetish blown out من proportion by fans من no fap influencers pretending الى be stoics لـ audience capture, but it’s just another vector من control. All it takes الى shift ال Overton window is الى change what qualifies as “porn”. Anyone can be labeled, including you, as not pious enough by a جديد morality police. Tracking what you do, say, watch, و react الى online و off, simply because they can. Who’s going الى stop them?

It sounds alarmist. Like: “it could never happen here.” Wherever here might be لـ you. But tell that الى women في Iran, لـ example, beaten و killed لـ showing a bit too much من ال hair على ال head or a flash من bare skinned shoulders.
Does it give you much comfort الى think Project 2025, if we let it happen, is any different?
These are just some من ال people you can thank لـ bringing this nightmare الى ال cusp من becoming politically mainstream:
دونالد ترامب:

His re-election will bring Project 2025 الى life. ال official agenda لـ his administration is الى dismantle democratic norms, consolidate power, و enforce authoritarian policies, making him ال linchpin من this plan في this election cycle.
بول دانس:

Director من ال 2025 Presidential Transition Project. His role في organizing و executing ال transition plan is crucial, ensuring that loyalists fill key positions و ال project’s policies are implemented swiftly.
كيفن روبرتس:

President من ال Heritage Foundation, which is driving Project 2025. Roberts’ leadership provides ال intellectual و strategic framework لـ ال entire initiative. He recently became famous لـ threatening bloodshed if “ال left” doesn’t surrender peacefully.
إد كوريغان:
Key strategist within ال Heritage Foundation, Corrigan’s involvement ensures that ال project’s policies are meticulously planned و executed.
كين كوتشينيلي:

A prominent figure, و former Acting Deputy Secretary من ال Department من Homeland Security, Cuccinelli’s familiarity مع ال inner workings من immigration و homeland security في ال Executive branch shapes many من ال more draconian policies في Project 2025.
إيلون ماسك:

Musk’s seemingly recent alignment مع far-right ideologies, conspiracy theories, و his massive influence through سوشيال media platforms like whatever we are now calling Twitter, make him a critical ally لـ Project 2025. His support amplifies ال project’s reach و normalizes extreme views. Gifting $45 million per month الى a Trump allied SuperPac one من many ways his impact has been felt throughout this election.
ليونارد ليو:

Known لـ his role في reshaping ال judiciary, Leo’s involvement في Project 2025 will mean continued placement على ال bench من inexperienced و compliant judges مع questionable qualifications as best. Conveniently لـ them, this cements many من Project 2025’s key policies as they get challenges في ال courts.
سياق أكتر شوية:

Project 2025 is not an isolated threat. It’s ال endgame من ال same leisure trap we brought up earlier. ال devaluation من personal agency و ال seductive allure من passive leisure, now manifests as a political juggernaut, مع opportunists incentivized الى get what they can out من ال chaos. ال same way so many fall لـ ال false promises من influencer lifestyles, we’re coaxed into a political system that strips away freedoms while promising WWE bravado + rule by convicted felons.

Here are a few more resources الى get you started على DYOR و الى help you get through ال anxiety attack as quickly as possible. What you’ll find على ال other side is ال resolve الى stop this alt-timeline nightmare من destroying everything we’ve all built:
ما بعد الحدث
Trump Plan الى ELIMINATE Future Elections is Exposed
ال Pledge
Secretary من Retribution
مشروع 2025: الخطة شبه المعلنة لولاية ترامب التانية
Trump Should Be Nowhere Near ال White House
Come back when you’re ready. We have more work الى do.
والدلوقتي؟
We’re not empty-handed في this fight. Unique skills, potent tools — that’s our foundation.
Vote, even if it feels like a drop في ال ocean. Spread knowledge like you’re about الى lose it all.
Educate anyone who’ll listen. و when ال panic sets في?
عدّيها. ده مجرد إنسانيتك اللي باينة.
But remember, ال decentralized mechanisms we’ve built, لـ money, agency, و culture?
لسه فيهم طاقة. استخدمهم.
ال good news is, ال fight isn’t over yet. و, we can win.
MARKETS ARE سوشيال TECHNOLOGY

We need a 4th wall break الى check our priors here — take a deep breath و shake out ال cortisol spike. Let’s talk about a better understanding من markets, و ليه they remain one من ال most consequential سوشيال technologies من all time.

When we say markets we mean mediums من exchange و interaction في all forms. من ال بوست-ديجيتال commons, الى سوشيال network platforms, الى ال cells, hormones, و nutrients في our own bodies, الى ال سوشيال contracts that give societies their legitimacy, و من course الى ال financial و commercial markets most associated مع ال term. This tool vaporizes ال distance between us, so we can engage في trade, في thoughts, agreements, units من organization, و goods. Markets invite us الى compete without ال need لـ unmasked violence و ال most cartelesque deceptions.
But, there are no built في protections, في our markets or technologies, لـ them either. No protections لـ our own flavors من semi-rational و subprime interest.

We aren’t perfect. Neither are our markets, technologies, or societies. ال beautiful shock is that we don’t need them, or us, الى be. We do need deterrence, though. مع ال bite من enough expense, that it makes any who would capture و dismantle open networks, think once, twice, و as many times as it takes الى never try it again .

That is ال value من web3 mechanisms. Distilled الى their most plain spoken. They bite those that betray ال trust من open channels لـ good faith trade, friendly competition, و ال right الى engage في useful teamwork whenever, wherever, و لـ as long as we choose الى.
I don’t remember where I heard this, but it says something profound, related, و pretty well:
“If you had الى sum up what has made humans such a successful species, it’s teamwork.”
NPC STUDIO : A MODEST CONTRIBUTION الى TEAMWORK مع ذكاء اصطناعي
Still في active development, daily, but here’s a first taste من ال past multi months من design و code: https://npcstudio.xyz/
Alright, nightmare fuel speed run complete. It’s time now الى focus على ال simple ways teamwork مع LLM powered characters can help us build better going forward.
No breathless hype. NPCs aren’t going الى save ال world. But they might make a dent في a non-trivial way, off-loading chunks من ازاي we work, live, و play.
مع 35 characters at launch, each one has their signature look, traits, style, personality, extensive background story لـ world building, بروفايل, و a diverse selection من languages spoken.

They were custom designed one at a time, using Stable Diffusion لـ initial character drafts, sprawling ControlNet + IPAdapter workflows لـ as close as ال current generation من diffusion model tech gets الى consistent character و pose sheets (which at ال time من this writing is still a very janky process — don’t believe ال YouTube ذكاء اصطناعي influencer hype accounts), heavy use من inpainting, و extensive hand editing.

Each character sheet has 144 cells (12x12) من distinct poses الى strike a balance between efficient processing من sprites vs precision level من graphic details و character walk cycle transitions لـ ال chosen aesthetic.

We believe it is better الى build a transparent project that embraces ال limitations من current gen ذكاء اصطناعي text و visual models, instead من making a wasted effort الى hide them, or pretend model capabilities are far more advanced و easy الى use than they are.

There is a distinct retro computing inspired look الى ال interface, cyberpunk tinged و leaning into ال mix من art techniques. You might spot some من ال influences quickly, while others can be more subtle. Rough cut edges, pixel art من throwback 80’s/90s video games, و punk zine collage art are a few من ال more obvious ones الى get you started. What else do you see?

Each NPC has a unique account على لينز, allowing characters الى connect مع users و other NPCs في a web3 native way, keeping a public memory من their سوشيال activity that evolves dynamically over time.

Publishing الى لينز is a core feature من ال studio, making لـ a massive multiplayer سوشيال experiment, mixing simulated evaluation من LLM based character performance مع live على-chain effects لـ ال world الى see.
You can like, collect, mirror, share, و vibe مع these NPCs through your لينز app من choice, today.

One strength من web3 + generative ذكاء اصطناعي is that we can publish what we want, as much as we want.
